bbApiSubscriptionKey.description: The access key found on your Blackbaud "My subscriptions" page.
bbApiSubscriptionKey.label: Blackbaud API Subscription Key

actions.name: Create Constituent Action
actions.description: Create a Constituent Action record in Raiser's Edge NXT.

fields.label: Date
fields.description: The action date in ISO-8601 format.

date.title: Date
date.description: The action date in ISO-8601 format.

fields.label: Category
fields.description: The channel or intent of the constituent interaction. Available values are Phone Call, Meeting, Mailing, Email, and Task/Other.

category.title: Category
category.description: The channel or intent of the constituent interaction. Available values are Phone Call, Meeting, Mailing, Email, and Task/Other.

fields.label: Completed
fields.description: Indicates whether the action is complete.

completed.title: Completed
completed.description: Indicates whether the action is complete.

fields.label: Completed Date
fields.description: The date when the action was completed in ISO-8601 format.

completed_date.title: Completed Date
completed_date.description: The date when the action was completed in ISO-8601 format.

fields.label: Description
fields.description: The detailed explanation that elaborates on the action summary.

description.title: Description
description.description: The detailed explanation that elaborates on the action summary.

fields.label: Direction
fields.description: The direction of the action. Available values are "Inbound" and "Outbound".

direction.title: Direction
direction.description: The direction of the action. Available values are "Inbound" and "Outbound".

fields.label: End Time
fields.description: The end time of the action. Uses 24-hour time in the HH:mm format. For example, 17:30 represents 5:30 p.m.

end_time.title: End Time
end_time.description: The end time of the action. Uses 24-hour time in the HH:mm format. For example, 17:30 represents 5:30 p.m.

fields.label: Fundraisers
fields.description: The set of immutable constituent system record IDs for the fundraisers associated with the action.

fundraisers.title: Fundraisers
fundraisers.description: The set of immutable constituent system record IDs for the fundraisers associated with the action.

fields.label: Location
fields.description: The location of the action. Available values are the entries in the Action Locations table.

location.title: Location
location.description: The location of the action. Available values are the entries in the Action Locations table.

fields.label: Opportunity ID
fields.description: The immutable system record ID of the opportunity associated with the action.

opportunity_id.title: Opportunity ID
opportunity_id.description: The immutable system record ID of the opportunity associated with the action.

fields.label: Outcome
fields.description: The outcome of the action. Available values are Successful and Unsuccessful.

outcome.title: Outcome
outcome.description: The outcome of the action. Available values are Successful and Unsuccessful.

fields.label: Priority
fields.description: The priority of the action. Available values are Normal, High, and Low.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: The priority of the action. Available values are Normal, High, and Low.

fields.label: Start Time
fields.description: The start time of the action. Uses 24-hour time in the HH:mm format. For example, 17:30 represents 5:30 p.m.

start_time.title: Start Time
start_time.description: The start time of the action. Uses 24-hour time in the HH:mm format. For example, 17:30 represents 5:30 p.m.

fields.label: Status
fields.description: The action status. If the system is configured to use custom action statuses, available values are the entries in the Action Status table.

status.title: Status
status.description: The action status. If the system is configured to use custom action statuses, available values are the entries in the Action Status table.

fields.label: Summary
fields.description: The short description of the action that appears at the top of the record. Limited to 255 characters.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: The short description of the action that appears at the top of the record. Limited to 255 characters.

fields.label: Type
fields.description: Additional description of the action to complement the category. Available values are the entries in the Actions table.

type.title: Type
type.description: Additional description of the action to complement the category. Available values are the entries in the Actions table.

fields.label: Author
fields.description: The author of the action's summary and description. If not supplied, will have a default set based on the user's account. Limited to 50 characters.

author.title: Author
author.description: The author of the action's summary and description. If not supplied, will have a default set based on the user's account. Limited to 50 characters.

fields.label: Constituent Address
fields.description: The constituent's address.

fields.label: Constituent Birthdate
fields.description: The constituent's birthdate.

fields.label: Constituent Birthplace
fields.description: The birthplace of the constituent.

fields.label: Constituent ID
fields.description: The ID of the constituent.

fields.label: Constituent Email
fields.description: The constituent's email address.

fields.label: Constituent Ethnicity
fields.description: The ethnicity of the constituent.

fields.label: Constituent First Name
fields.description: The constituent's first name up to 50 characters.

constituent_first.title: Constituent First Name
constituent_first.description: The constituent's first name up to 50 characters.

fields.label: Constituent Former Name
fields.description: The constituent's former name up to 100 characters.

constituent_former_name.title: Constituent Former Name
constituent_former_name.description: The constituent's former name up to 100 characters.

fields.label: Constituent Gender
fields.description: The constituent's gender.

fields.label: Constituent Gives Anonymously
fields.description: Indicates whether the constituent gives anonymously.

constituent_gives_anonymously.title: Constituent Gives Anonymously
constituent_gives_anonymously.description: Indicates whether the constituent gives anonymously.

fields.label: Constituent Income
fields.description: The constituent's income.

fields.label: Constituent Industry
fields.description: The constituent's industry.

fields.label: Constituent Last Name
fields.description: The constituent's last name up to 100 characters. This is required to create a constituent.

constituent_last.title: Constituent Last Name
constituent_last.description: The constituent's last name up to 100 characters. This is required to create a constituent.

fields.label: Constituent Lookup ID
fields.description: The organization-defined identifier for the constituent.

constituent_lookup_id.title: Constituent Lookup ID
constituent_lookup_id.description: The organization-defined identifier for the constituent.

fields.label: Constituent Marital Status
fields.description: The constituent's marital status. Available values are the entries in the Marital Status table.

constituent_marital_status.title: Constituent Marital Status
constituent_marital_status.description: The constituent's marital status. Available values are the entries in the Marital Status table.

fields.label: Constituent Online Presence
fields.description: The constituent's online presence.

fields.label: Constituent Phone
fields.description: The constituent's phone number.

fields.label: Constituent Preferred Name
fields.description: The constituent's preferred name up to 50 characters.

constituent_preferred_name.title: Constituent Preferred Name
constituent_preferred_name.description: The constituent's preferred name up to 50 characters.

fields.label: Constituent Religion
fields.description: The religion of the constituent.

fields.label: Constituent Suffix
fields.description: The constituent's primary suffix. Available values are the entries in the Suffixes table.

constituent_suffix.title: Constituent Suffix
constituent_suffix.description: The constituent's primary suffix. Available values are the entries in the Suffixes table.

fields.label: Constituent Secondary Suffix
fields.description: The constituent's secondary suffix. Available values are the entries in the Suffixes table.

constituent_suffix_2.title: Constituent Secondary Suffix
constituent_suffix_2.description: The constituent's secondary suffix. Available values are the entries in the Suffixes table.

fields.label: Constituent Title
fields.description: The constituent's primary title. Available values are the entries in the Titles table.

constituent_title.title: Constituent Title
constituent_title.description: The constituent's primary title. Available values are the entries in the Titles table.

fields.label: Constituent Secondary Title
fields.description: The constituent's secondary title. Available values are the entries in the Titles table.

constituent_title_2.title: Constituent Secondary Title
constituent_title_2.description: The constituent's secondary title. Available values are the entries in the Titles table.

actions.name: Create Gift
actions.description: Create a Gift record in Raiser's Edge NXT.

fields.label: Acknowledgement
fields.description: The gift acknowledgement.

date.title: Date
date.description: The date associated with the acknowledgement in ISO-8601 format.

status.title: Status
status.description: The status of the acknowledgement. Available values are: ACKNOWLEDGED, NEEDSACKNOWLEDGEMENT, and DONOTACKNOWLEDGE.

fields.label: Gift Amount
fields.description: The monetary amount of the gift in number format, e.g. 12.34

amount.title: Gift Amount
amount.description: The monetary amount of the gift in number format, e.g. 12.34

fields.label: Batch Number
fields.description: The batch number of the gift up to 50 characters (including the batch prefix).

batch_number.title: Batch Number
batch_number.description: The batch number of the gift up to 50 characters (including the batch prefix).

fields.label: Batch Prefix
fields.description: The batch prefix of the gift. If provided, must include at least one letter. Required when Batch Number has a value, and defaults to "API" if no value is provided.

batch_prefix.title: Batch Prefix
batch_prefix.description: The batch prefix of the gift. If provided, must include at least one letter. Required when Batch Number has a value, and defaults to "API" if no value is provided.

fields.label: Check Date
fields.description: The check date in ISO-8601 format.

check_date.title: Check Date
check_date.description: The check date in ISO-8601 format.

fields.label: Check Number
fields.description: The check number in string format, e.g. "12345"

check_number.title: Check Number
check_number.description: The check number in string format, e.g. "12345"

fields.label: Constituency
fields.description: The constituency value of the gift. If no value is provided, the default constituency of the donor will be used.

constituency.title: Constituency
constituency.description: The constituency value of the gift. If no value is provided, the default constituency of the donor will be used.

fields.label: Gift Date
fields.description: The gift date in ISO-8601 format.

date.title: Gift Date
date.description: The gift date in ISO-8601 format.

fields.label: Default Fundraiser Credits
fields.description: Indicates whether to use default fundraiser credits.

default_fundraiser_credits.title: Default Fundraiser Credits
default_fundraiser_credits.description: Indicates whether to use default fundraiser credits.

fields.label: Default Soft Credits
fields.description: Indicates whether to use default soft credits.

default_soft_credits.title: Default Soft Credits
default_soft_credits.description: Indicates whether to use default soft credits.

fields.label: Fund ID
fields.description: The ID of the fund associated with the gift.

fund_id.title: Fund ID
fund_id.description: The ID of the fund associated with the gift.

fields.label: Gift Code
fields.description: The gift code. Available values are the entries in the Gift Code table.

gift_code.title: Gift Code
gift_code.description: The gift code. Available values are the entries in the Gift Code table.

fields.label: Gift Status
fields.description: The status of the gift. Available values are "Active", "Held", "Terminated", "Completed", and "Cancelled".

gift_status.title: Gift Status
gift_status.description: The status of the gift. Available values are "Active", "Held", "Terminated", "Completed", and "Cancelled".

fields.label: Is Anonymous
fields.description: Indicates whether the gift is anonymous.

is_anonymous.title: Is Anonymous
is_anonymous.description: Indicates whether the gift is anonymous.

fields.label: Linked Gifts
fields.description: The recurring gift associated with the payment being added. When adding a recurring gift payment, a linked_gifts field must be included as an array of strings with the ID of the recurring gift to which the payment is linked.

linked_gifts.title: Linked Gifts
linked_gifts.description: The recurring gift associated with the payment being added. When adding a recurring gift payment, a linked_gifts field must be included as an array of strings with the ID of the recurring gift to which the payment is linked.

fields.label: Lookup ID
fields.description: The organization-defined identifier for the gift.

lookup_id.title: Lookup ID
lookup_id.description: The organization-defined identifier for the gift.

fields.label: Payment Method
fields.description: The payment method. Available values are "Cash", "CreditCard", "PersonalCheck", "DirectDebit", "Other", "PayPal", or "Venmo".

payment_method.title: Payment Method
payment_method.description: The payment method. Available values are "Cash", "CreditCard", "PersonalCheck", "DirectDebit", "Other", "PayPal", or "Venmo".

fields.label: Post Date
fields.description: The date that the gift was posted to general ledger in ISO-8601 format.

post_date.title: Post Date
post_date.description: The date that the gift was posted to general ledger in ISO-8601 format.

fields.label: Post Status
fields.description: The general ledger post status of the gift. Available values are "Posted", "NotPosted", and "DoNotPost".

post_status.title: Post Status
post_status.description: The general ledger post status of the gift. Available values are "Posted", "NotPosted", and "DoNotPost".

fields.label: Receipt
fields.description: The gift receipt.

date.title: Date
date.description: The date that the gift was receipted. Includes an offset from UTC in ISO-8601 format: 1969-11-21T10:29:43.

status.title: Status
status.description: The receipt status of the gift. Available values are RECEIPTED, NEEDSRECEIPT, and DONOTRECEIPT.

fields.label: Recurring Gift Schedule
fields.description: The recurring gift schedule. When adding a recurring gift, a schedule is required.

recurring_gift_schedule.title: Recurring Gift Schedule
recurring_gift_schedule.description: The recurring gift schedule. When adding a recurring gift, a schedule is required.

end_date.title: End Date
end_date.description: Date the recurring gift should end in ISO-8601 format.

frequency.title: Frequency
frequency.description: Installment frequency of the recurring gift to add. Available values are WEEKLY, EVERY_TWO_WEEKS, EVERY_FOUR_WEEKS, MONTHLY, QUARTERLY, ANNUALLY.

start_date.title: Start Date
start_date.description: Date the recurring gift should start in ISO-8601 format.

fields.label: Reference
fields.description: Notes to track special details about a gift such as the motivation behind it or a detailed description of a gift-in-kind. Limited to 255 characters.

reference.title: Reference
reference.description: Notes to track special details about a gift such as the motivation behind it or a detailed description of a gift-in-kind. Limited to 255 characters.

fields.label: Subtype
fields.description: The subtype of the gift.

fields.label: Type
fields.description: The gift type. Available values are "Donation", "Other", "GiftInKind", "RecurringGift", and "RecurringGiftPayment".

type.title: Type
type.description: The gift type. Available values are "Donation", "Other", "GiftInKind", "RecurringGift", and "RecurringGiftPayment".
